allow: PowerShell(cd d:\\Fahlevithing; $content = Get-Content 'echoes-beneath-the-thames.html' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $updated = $content -replace 'rel="noopener">', 'rel="noopener noreferrer">'; if \($content -ne $updated\) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("$PWD\\echoes-beneath-the-thames.html", $updated, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Output "Fixed echoes-beneath-the-thames.html" } else { Write-Output "No change needed" })
